topStories.title: Trump calls Asim Munir, Shehbaz Sharif ‘extraordinary men’ for hosting US-Iran talks; says they ‘continuously thank me’
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday lauded Pakistan leaders, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir, for hosting US-Iran talks. Calling them ‘extraordinary men,’ Trump said that the two continuously thank him for stopping the India-Pakistan war last year

dailyNews.title: Who was Danhao Wang? Chinese scholar at University of Michigan who reportedly died after 'hostile' questioning by US
dailyNews.description: China has now called for a ‘thorough investigation’ after a postdoctoral researcher reportedly died after falling from a campus building, a day after he was questioned by US authorities. Here's all you need to know about Danhao Wang.

dailyNews.description: Besides developments related to Middle East, crude oil prices would also dictate market trends in a holiday-shortened week ahead, analyst said.

dailyNews.title: US weather alert today: Storm warning for California as Sierra Nevada faces heavy snow, strong winds
dailyNews.description: The National Weather Service has issued a winter storm warning for parts of central California, cautioning that snow accumulations could reach up to 14 inches in some areas, accompanied by wind gusts of up to 45 mph.

dailyNews.title: US Democratic lawmaker Eric Swalwell faces alleged unauthorized employment of Brazilian nanny
dailyNews.description: The complaint, filed by documentary researcher Joel Gilbert, centers on Brazilian national Amanda Raissa Barbosa, who entered the United States under a J-1 Exchange Visitor visa as an au pair.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders Hormuz blockade, warns Iran over nuclear standoff
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said: “Effective immediately, the United States Navy… will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz.” He added that the move aims to counter what he described as “world extortion” by Iran.

dailyNews.title: First life-size statue of Swami Vivekananda unveiled in Seattle, US - see pics
dailyNews.description: The life-size bronze statue has been installed at the bustling Westlake Square in downtown Seattle. Officials said this is the first such installation to be hosted by a city government anywhere in the US.

dailyNews.title: Trump details sweeping 'all or nothing' blockade of Strait of Hormuz after failed Iran talks
dailyNews.description: In a Maria Bartiromo exclusive, Trump vows to choke off Iran's oil profits with a sweeping U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz region.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders a blockade in the Strait of Hormuz as tensions with Iran soar
dailyNews.description: Trump says the U.S. Navy will blockade the Strait of Hormuz and interdict vessels that paid tolls to Iran following a stalemate in peace talks.

dailyNews.title: Hungarians vote in record numbers as Trump-ally Viktor Orbán faces biggest electoral threat since 2010
dailyNews.description: Hungarians vote in pivotal election pitting PM Viktor Orbán against rival Peter Magyar. Vice President JD Vance visited Hungary last week and met with the prime minister.

dailyNews.title: NASA chief declares America 'absolutely back' in space race, says US will beat China to the moon
dailyNews.description: NASA says America is "absolutely back" in the space race, rushing to beat China to the moon and build a lunar base under Trump-era Artemis program.

dailyNews.title: Trump gets Dana White to add fight to UFC White House card after personal ask
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump asked Dana White to add Derrick Lewis to the UFC Freedom 250 White House event, leading to a new bout against Josh Hokit.

dailyNews.title: What Now? Vance Leaves Iran Talks Without a Deal.
dailyNews.description: The lack of a breakthrough after 21 hours of negotiations leaves the Trump administration facing several unpalatable options.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s War With Iran Has Weakened America
dailyNews.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. to blockade ships in Strait of Hormuz after failed peace talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters that "we have not reached an agreement" following face-to-face talks with Iranian leaders and Pakistani negotiators.

dailyNews.title: CBS News poll finds few see U.S. goals being met in Iran yet
dailyNews.description: Gas prices put pressure on pocketbooks — and President Trump's ratings — as Iran war continues.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Mike Turner defends Trump's handling of Iran war
dailyNews.description: GOP Rep. Mike Turner of Ohio defended the president's handling of the Iran war, saying he is focused on preventing Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon.
